activities.name: Get TableList
activities.description: Extracting the relevant tables for this data load.

activities.name: Looping Tables
activities.description: Looping through all tables for optimization, configurable to run sequentially or in batch mode.

activities.name: Tables or Files
activities.description: Evaluating LoadType to determine if it is set to Tables (True) or Files (False, different logic applies).

ifFalseActivities.name: Files - Bronze Lakehouse
ifFalseActivities.description: Loading data from the source into the Bronze Lakehouse as files.

ifFalseActivities.name: Files - Success Activity Log
ifFalseActivities.description: Capturing Success logs to analyze future outcomes, including success status and row counts copied.

ifFalseActivities.name: Files - Failure Activity Log
ifFalseActivities.description: Capturing Failure logs to analyze future outcomes, including success status and row counts copied.

value.value: @coalesce(if(and(not(empty(activity('Files - Bronze Lakehouse').output.errors)),not(empty(activity('Files - Bronze Lakehouse').output.errors[0].Message))),activity('Files - Bronze Lakehouse').output.errors[0].Message,'NotExecuted'),'unknown error due to connection establishment')

ifTrueActivities.name: Tables - Bronze Lakehouse
ifTrueActivities.description: Loading data from the source into the Bronze Lakehouse as tables.

ifTrueActivities.name: Tables - Success Activity Log
ifTrueActivities.description: Capturing Success logs to analyze future outcomes, including success status and row counts copied.

ifTrueActivities.name: Tables - Activity Log Table
ifTrueActivities.description: Capturing Failure logs to analyze future outcomes, including success status and row counts copied.

value.value: @coalesce(if(and(not(empty(activity('Tables - Bronze Lakehouse').output.errors)),not(empty(activity('Tables - Bronze Lakehouse').output.errors[0].Message))),activity('Tables - Bronze Lakehouse').output.errors[0].Message,'NotExecuted'),'unknown error due to connection establishment')

activities.description: Defining pipeline start time for logging purposes.

activities.name: Pipeline Log Success
activities.description: Capturing success logs at the pipeline level

activities.description: Executing the NB_DF_DW notebook to process data from Bronze to Silver/Gold layers.
